title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 8: The Funeral of Enkidu
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 8 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh mourns Enkidu and commissions a magnificent funeral.
introduction: Tablet 8 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh mourns Enkidu and commissions a magnificent funeral.

translation.text: Hear me, O elders, hear me! I weep for Enkidu, my friend. Like a wailing woman I cry. The axe at my side, the bow in my hand — they have been taken from me.
